modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Macros in Office 365 files are blocked due to security settings.

full_description_text: User tried to open macro enabled files in Word and Excel. They got a message saying macros are blocked. This is because the files are from an untrusted source. Need to check security settings to allow macros.
short_description: Macros in Office 365 files are blocked due to security settings.
description: User tried to open macro enabled files in Word and Excel. They got a message saying macros are blocked. This is because the files are from an untrusted source. Need to check security settings to allow macros.
